title: Monitoring, Logging, and Debugging — Forum
text:
You're welcome to join the official Kubernetes Forum:
discuss.kubernetes.io
.

If you have what looks like a bug, or you would like to make a feature request,
please use the
GitHub issue tracking system
.
Before you file an issue, please search existing issues to see if your issue is
already covered.
If filing a bug, please include detailed information about how to reproduce the
problem, such as:
Kubernetes version:
kubectl version
Cloud provider, OS distro, network configuration, and container runtime version
Steps to reproduce the problem
